title: saxifraga stellaris subsp. clusii
intro: Saxifraga stellaris subsp. clusii, also known as Starry Saxifrage, is a plant species belonging to the saxifrage family, native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, with potential medicinal uses in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Saxifraga stellaris subsp. clusii are thought to be attributed to its high antioxidant content, which can help protect against cell damage and promote overall well-being. In herbal preparations, the plant can be made into a tea, decoction, or tincture, with the leaves and roots typically being used for medicinal purposes.
